description: PROP-002 (apply determinism) and PROP-007 (sort determinism) harnesses originally only exercised arbAppliedFilterNoOp(), leaving the non-trivial filter/search/sort branches uninvigorated. The harnesses now mix arbAppliedFilterMixed and arbAppliedFilterWithTags so the universal determinism claim is witnessed across non-trivial AppliedFilter cases.

evidence.snippet: Pre-fix: only arbAppliedFilterNoOp(). Post-fix: 4 tests including arbAppliedFilterMixed (500 runs) and arbAppliedFilterWithTags (200 runs); prop-007 mirrors this structure.

resolution.notes: Added arbAppliedFilterMixed in _arbitraries.ts (weighted oneof of no-op, with-tags, search+sort) and replumbed PROP-002 / PROP-007 harnesses to exercise non-trivial branches.
